name: @appium/oxtools-config
description: Shared Oxlint and Oxfmt config for Appium projects
author: https://github.com/appium

scripts.test:smoke: node --input-type=module -e "import oxlintConfig, {defineConfig, ignorePatterns} from './oxlint.mjs'; import oxfmtConfig, {fmtIgnorePatterns} from './oxfmt.mjs'; if (!oxlintConfig?.overrides?.length) throw new Error('invalid oxlint config'); if (!ignorePatterns?.length) throw new Error('invalid ignorePatterns'); if (typeof defineConfig !== 'function') throw new Error('invalid defineConfig'); if (!oxfmtConfig?.singleQuote) throw new Error('invalid oxfmt config'); if (!fmtIgnorePatterns?.length) throw new Error('invalid fmtIgnorePatterns')"
